title: Avoid Mocking All Non-Private Methods of a Class
description: If you end up mocking every non-private method of a class in order to write tests, it is a strong sign that your test became too complex, or that you misunderstood the way you are supposed to use the mocking mechanism.
recommendation: Refactor the test code into multiple units, or consider using the class itself.
impact: Impact on code quality and test complexity

checks.message: Refactor the test code into multiple units, or consider using the class itself.
